package rulecoverage

func NegativeStringsBuilderWithoutGrowKnownBound() string {
    ruleID := "strings_builder_without_grow_known_bound"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "strings.Builder used without Grow when approximate output size is locally visible."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
